review: The core idea is solid and genuinely useful — I've already applied two of the frameworks from chapter four. But the author pads it out with repetitive anecdotes and the last third is basically filler. Could have been a tight 50-page essay. Good ideas, poor editing.

examples.review: Absolute trash. Poorly written, boring plot, total waste of money.
It was fine. Not great, not terrible. A decent read to pass the time.
A masterpiece. Every page pulled me deeper in. One of the best books I've ever read.
